title: Storage Displays
description: Shows contents of first slot in Inventories
body:
# Want to know what's in your storage at a glance?

This pack adds a block that displays the contents of the first slot of the storage container it is placed on.

### Crafting recipe for the Storage Display:

![crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63f7ffdc0350576e9505f87577b0bbc3a667bd57.png)

If you want to remove the Display, just left klick on it and it will pop off.

Storage displays can be placed on any container that has a chest inventory (not ender chests)

You can place it on: Chests, Trapped Chests, Shulkerboxes, Barrels.
They can be placed in any direction (east, west, north, south) and on top of containers.
